content.query:
insert into appl.hg_deid_claims_t

    ,[CLAIM_TYPE]
    ,[DOS_BEGIN]
    ,[DOS_END]
    ,[PRACT_NPI]

    ,[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
    ,[PROCEDURE_CODE]
    ,[PROC_MD_1]
    ,[PROC_MD_2]
    ,[PROC_MD_3]
    ,[PROC_MD_4] 
    ,[DIAG_CD1]
    ,[DIAG_CD2]
    ,[DIAG_CD3]
    ,[DIAG_CD4]
    ,[DIAG_CD5]
    ,[DIAG_CD6]
    ,[DIAG_CD7]
    ,[DIAG_CD8]
    ,[DIAG_CD9]

    ,[DIAG_CD11]

    ,[DIAG_CD14]

    ,[DIAG_CD16]

    ,[PATIENT_GENDER]

    ,[PROC_MD_3]
    ,[PROC_MD_4] 
    ,[DIAG_CD1]

    ,[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]

from appl.hg_deid_claims2_t;
